title: rosa coriifolia var. clivorum
intro: Rosa coriifolia var. clivorum, also known as the Rockrose or Coral Honeysuckle, is a type of flowering evergreen shrub native to the Himalayan regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa coriifolia var. clivorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicines.
